subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel.
source_quote: An imp (devil) with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra.
source_quote: rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap claimed to know everything about the city of Maerimydra.
source_quote: claiming to know everything about the city

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake.
source_quote: brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap has no desire to return to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: having no desire to return to the Nine Hells

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's food.
source_quote: who complained about the lack of salt in their food

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap revealed that the ruler of Maerimydra is Hledh.
source_quote: Pipyap revealed that the ruler of Maerimydra is Hledh

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap explained that the social hierarchy includes demons, giants, ogres, rothi, devils, and slaves.
source_quote: Pipyap explained the social hierarchy: demons, giants, ogres, rothi, devils, and slaves

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap identified Veperyd as the fiendish giant in charge of the Coliseum.
source_quote: one in charge of the Coliseum (Veperyd)

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap identified a fiendish giant managing the six-fingered courtyard.
source_quote: another managing the six-fingered courtyard

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap revealed that a wizard from Mulmaster has shown up for dinner at Vraxen's house.
source_quote: Pipyap revealed that a wizard from Mulmaster has shown up for dinner at Vraxen's house

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap explained that Vraxen lives in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: Pipyap explained that Vraxen lives in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap suggested a plan to cause a distraction by instigating a fight between Vraxen and Veperyd.
source_quote: Pipyap suggested a plan to cause a distraction by instigating a fight between Vraxen and Veperyd

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur helped craft a favorable contract with Pipyap.
source_quote: Felkur and Bramgrim successfully crafted a favorable contract with Pipyap

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Mage Hand to strip ill-fitting uniforms off ogres.
source_quote: Used by Felkur to tactically strip the ill-fitting uniforms off ogres

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur cast Fireball to initiate combat against ogres.
source_quote: Cast by Felkur to initiate combat against ogres

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Firebolt to deliver the finishing blow to the last remaining ogre.
source_quote: A cantrip used by Felkur to deliver the finishing blow to the last remaining ogre

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used Second Wind to restore his hit points to full health.
source_quote: Used by Daein and Felkur to restore their hit points to full health

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim helped craft a favorable contract with Pipyap.
source_quote: Felkur and Bramgrim successfully crafted a favorable contract with Pipyap

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar was controlled by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar was controlled by Graz'zt

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians during the Black Ember Outpost assault.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to engage in combat during the Black Ember Outpost assault

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lost concentration on Spirit Guardians after being struck by an ogre.
source_quote: He waded into the fray but lost concentration after being struck by an ogre

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms from being raised at the well.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to prevent alarms from being raised at the well

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Mass Healing Word to provide healing to the party.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim during the storeroom combat to provide healing to the party

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim dealt 27 points of necrotic damage during the storeroom combat.
source_quote: also dealing 27 points of necrotic damage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Auditory Illusions to create the vocalization of a female hellhound.
source_quote: Used by Daein to create the vocalization of a female hellhound

subject: Daein
fact: Daein mimicked a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won.
source_quote: to mimic a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won the battle

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a Protective Field to reduce damage from an ogre's attack.
source_quote: Used by Daein to reduce damage from an ogre's attack

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Second Wind to restore his hit points to full health.
source_quote: Used by Daein and Felkur to restore their hit points to full health

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to mark targets and enhance her attacks.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to mark targets and enhance her attacks against ogres

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in deep water.
source_quote: Helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in the deep water by allowing them to ride on its back

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak was a male Drow wizard whose private office was discovered by the party.
source_quote: A male Drow wizard whose private office and notes were discovered by the party

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak's writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: His writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: He blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak wished the Blink idea had been his.
source_quote: wished it had been his idea

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is the Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra.
source_quote: The Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh resides in the eastern castle of Maerimydra.
source_quote: residing in the eastern castle

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum.
source_quote: A fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum in Maerimydra

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd manages the betting pool at the Coliseum.
source_quote: and manages the betting pool

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd has been stealing money from Vraxen.
source_quote: from which Veperyd has been stealing

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who resides in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A Yugoloth who resides in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen possesses the book the party is seeking.
source_quote: He possesses the book the party is seeking

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool.
source_quote: has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster who has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence

subject: Veris
fact: Veris intends to acquire the book the party seeks.
source_quote: where he intends to acquire the book the party seeks

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: Secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris
fact: Veris sets the party's deadline to steal the book before the dinner concludes.
source_quote: he obtains it. Secretly hunting Felkur, he is a rival buyer for the tome and sets the party's deadline — they must steal the book before the dinner concludes

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar.
source_quote: A demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood.
source_quote: He made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's symbol is a six-fingered hand.
source_quote: His symbol is a six-fingered hand

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth is the Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time.
source_quote: The Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth's powers returned after the Blink event.
source_quote: Her powers returned after 'the Blink'

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth used the Blink to escape imprisonment.
source_quote: an event she used to escape imprisonment

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass wants the party to steal the book from Vraxen.
source_quote: A specific book that Maram il Vass wants the party to steal from Vraxen

subject: Ultraloth
fact: The party leveraged past experience with an Ultraloth to craft the contract.
source_quote: leveraging their past experience with an Ultraloth

subject: contract negotiation
fact: The party rejected Pipyap's initial standard contract.
source_quote: The party rejected the initial contract

subject: contract negotiation
fact: The party negotiated a new contract with Pipyap.
source_quote: and negotiated a new one

subject: feeding Pipyap
fact: The party fed Pipyap.
source_quote: The party fed Pipyap

subject: healing
fact: The party used second wind to heal Daein and Felkur to full health.
source_quote: The party decided to use second wind to heal Daein and Felkur to full health

subject: Blink event
fact: The Blink event caused Lolth to escape imprisonment.
source_quote: an event she used to escape imprisonment

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is a fortress built into a cave wall in the Underdark.
source_quote: A fortress built into a cave wall in the Underdark

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is made of polished obsidian.
source_quote: made of polished obsidian

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds.
source_quote: It served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds

subject: Storeroom
fact: The Storeroom contained a hidden chest with treasures.
source_quote: It contained a hidden chest with treasures

subject: Storeroom
fact: The Storeroom served as the entry point to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: and served as the entry point to the Path of Shadows

subject: Well
fact: The Well in the storeroom was recognized as the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: recognized as the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The Path of Shadows is an underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep.
source_quote: An underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The Path of Shadows features a five-foot-wide tunnel that the party swam through for about 40 feet.
source_quote: It features a five-foot-wide tunnel that the party swam through for about 40 feet

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Office
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Office contains a lamp and papers detailing his research.
source_quote: containing a lamp and papers detailing Solom's research

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash.
source_quote: A former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point.
source_quote: nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt.
source_quote: It is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra features plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs.
source_quote: a thick smoke layer above 250 feet, and is lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol.
source_quote: surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants gather at the Six-Fingered Courtyard to worship a demon lord.
source_quote: Demons and giants gather here to worship a demon lord

subject: Coliseum
fact: The Coliseum is a massive structure dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A massive coliseum dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra

subject: Coliseum
fact: Great gladiator fights occur at the Coliseum.
source_quote: where great gladiator fights occur

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The Eastern Castle has two towers stretching from floor to ceiling.
source_quote: with two towers stretching from floor to ceiling

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains the book the party seeks.
source_quote: It contains the book the party seeks

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains a teleportation circle.
source_quote: and a teleportation circle

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: A dinner event is scheduled to occur at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: Potion of Flying
fact: The Potion of Flying was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
fact: The Potion of Fire Giant Strength was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: Coral Gemstones were found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Gemstones found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: The Coral Gemstones were valued at a total of 400 gold pieces.
source_quote: valued at a total of 400 gold pieces

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes contain his research, theories on the Blink event, and observations about demons.
source_quote: Papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office containing his research, theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, observations about demons appearing after the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes include complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself.
source_quote: The notes also included his complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself

subject: Contract with Pipyap
fact: The Contract with Pipyap binds him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts.
source_quote: binding him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts

subject: The Book
fact: The Book is located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Pipyap's Satchel
fact: Pipyap's Satchel is a bloodstained satchel with an oversized button.
source_quote: A bloodstained satchel with an oversized button

subject: Pipyap's Satchel
fact: Pipyap desperately tried to keep hold of his satchel while being tormented by ogres.
source_quote: He desperately tried to keep hold of it while being tormented by ogres

subject: ogres
fact: Four ogres were tormenting Pipyap in Maerimydra.
source_quote: rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra

subject: ogres
fact: Ogres were hauling water from a well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: where ogres were hauling water from a well

subject: hellhounds
fact: The Black Ember Outpost served as a base for hellhounds.
source_quote: It served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds

subject: hellhounds
fact: Daein created the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds.
source_quote: to create the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds

subject: fiendish giants
fact: Two fiendish giants were identified by Pipyap: one in charge of the Coliseum and one managing the six-fingered courtyard.
source_quote: He identified the locations of two fiendish giants: one in charge of the Coliseum (Veperyd) and another managing the six-fingered courtyard

subject: fire giant
fact: A fire giant sergeant and his troops were present at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: creating a distraction for the fire giant sergeant and his troops

subject: fire giant
fact: Daein mimicked a fire giant's voice to convince the outpost that the giants had won.
source_quote: to mimic a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won the battle

subject: dinner event
fact: A dinner event is scheduled at Vraxen's residence where a Mulmaster wizard intends to acquire the book.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: theft of betting money
fact: Veperyd has been stealing money from Vraxen's betting pool.
source_quote: Veperyd stealing from Vraxen's bets

subject: Blink event
fact: The Blink event caused the faerzress to change and allowed demons to appear.
source_quote: his theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, his observations on the appearance of demons

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth's clerics were unable to commune with her for some time.
source_quote: whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth's clerics are regaining their powers after being silent.
source_quote: notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers after being silent
